title: Iran's authorities project hardened stance with more talks on horizon
snippet: Al Jazeera analysis: Iran's authorities project a hardened stance as talks remain uncertain. Trump blamed 'infighting' in Tehran for complicating negotiations. Divisions between Pezeshkian allies and Khamenei's office figures continue to derail diplomatic efforts. Iran's dual-track approach — diplomatic openness vs IRGC military escalation — remains unresolved.
tag_reason: 이란 내부 강경화 종합 분석은 신규. 페제시키안-하메네이 노선 대립 구도 심화 분석.
